zh.lifeSummary: 當Boleslaw II. von Polen於大約1253年出生時，他的父親Siemowit I Piast40歲，母親Perejesława Rurykowicz25歲。他於1279年與Prinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauen結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1313年4月20日享年61歲。

zh-hans.Ujazdów, Warszawa, Mazowieckie, Polska: 波兰馬左維次吉華利札瓦
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Boleslaw II. von Polen于大约1253年出生时，他的父亲Siemowit I Piast40岁，母亲Perejesława Rurykowicz25岁。他于1279年与Prinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauen结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1313年4月20日享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Polen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Dutch (Van Polen): ethnic name for a Pole or nickname for someone with some other connection with Poland, from Polen ‘Poland’.
Possibly also Irish: variant of   Polin  .

variants.name: Polin
meanings: Irish (counties Armagh and Down): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Póilín, a patronymic from a personal name formed from a pet form of Pól (see Paul ).
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Poland, from a Slavicized form of German Polen ‘Poland’.

nameMeanings.name: Boleslaw
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Boleslaw II. von Polen was born about 1253, his father, Siemowit I Piast, was 40 and his mother, Perejesława Rurykowicz, was 25. He married Prinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauen in 1279. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 20 April 1313, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Boleslaw II. von Polen est né environ 1253, son père, Siemowit I Piast, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Perejesława Rurykowicz, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Prinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauen en 1279. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 20 avril 1313, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Boleslaw II. von Polen um 1253 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Siemowit I Piast 40 und seine Mutter Perejesława Rurykowicz 25. Er hat 1279 Prinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. April 1313 im Alter von 61 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Boleslaw II. von Polen è nato il circa 1253, il suo padre, Siemowit I Piast, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Perejesława Rurykowicz, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Prinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauen nel 1279. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 aprile 1313, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Boleslaw II. von Polenが約1253年に生まれた時，父Siemowit I Piastは40歳，母Perejesława Rurykowiczは25歳であった。1279年にPrinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1313年4月20日に61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Boleslaw II. von Polen(이)가 대략 1253년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Siemowit I Piast(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Perejesława Rurykowicz(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1279년 Prinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1313년 4월 20일 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Boleslaw II. von Polen nasceu aproximadamente 1253, seu pai, Siemowit I Piast, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Perejesława Rurykowicz, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Prinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauen em 1279. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 20 de abril de 1313, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Boleslaw II. von Polen родился около 1253 г., его отцу по имени Siemowit I Piast было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Perejesława Rurykowicz, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Prinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauen в 1279 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 20 апреля 1313 г. в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Boleslaw II. von Polen nació aproximadamente 1253, su papá, Siemowit I Piast, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Perejesława Rurykowicz, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Prinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauen en 1279. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de abril de 1313, a la edad de 61 años.
